title: Playing Hide and Seek 玩捉迷藏
scene: Lily和朋友们在公园里玩捉迷藏。

lines.en: Let us play hide and seek! Who wants to be it?
lines.zh: 我们来玩捉迷藏！谁来当找人的？

lines.en: Close your eyes and count to twenty.
One, two, three... Ready or not, here I come!
lines.zh: 一、二、三……准备好了吗，我来了！

lines.en: I am hiding behind the big tree. Do not find me!
lines.zh: 我藏在大树后面。别找到我！

lines.en: I see your shoes behind the tree! Found you!
lines.zh: 我看到你的鞋在大树后面了！找到你了！

lines.en: Oh no! You are too good at this game.
lines.zh: 噢不！你太擅长这个游戏了。

lines.en: Now it is your turn to count. Go hide, Lily!
lines.zh: 现在轮到你数数了。去藏起来吧，Lily！

lines.en: You better hide well. I will find you!
lines.zh: 你最好藏好。我会找到你的！

lines.en: We will see! This is so much fun!
